hypothesis: Incorporating high-magnification (≥5,000×) SEM images into the two-stage transfer learning pipeline via a dual-branch CNN that fuses features from 500× and ≥5,000× inputs will significantly improve discrimination between formation-aged and 100-cycle NCM cathode states, yielding at least a 0.10 absolute increase in F1 score for those classes compared to using 500× images alone.
